description: Stricter threshold configuration for multi_asset_market_sync noise-aware validation. These thresholds are stricter than v112G to filter false-positive signals identified in the v112P audit gap (missing signal quality / false positive risk scoring).

stricter_vs_v112g.direction_agreement: v112G used 0.66 for all baskets; v112Q uses 1.0 for small (<=3) and 0.8 for large (>3)
stricter_vs_v112g.per_asset_price_filter: v112G only checked average; v112Q requires >=80% of assets to individually meet min_abs_price_change
stricter_vs_v112g.secondary_metric: v112G used OR logic for volume/OI; v112Q requires price AND one secondary metric
stricter_vs_v112g.timestamp_skew: v112G had no timestamp check; v112Q enforces max 60s skew between earliest and latest observation
stricter_vs_v112g.leader_driven: v112G had no leader detection; v112Q detects single-asset dominance and downgrades/blocks
stricter_vs_v112g.sector_concentration: v112G did not penalize sector dispersion; v112Q lowers confidence for mixed baskets
stricter_vs_v112g.volume_outlier: v112G used raw average; v112Q uses median-ratio detection (asset vol >5x median → block)
